where.if: AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cms.movie_review (title, nara, year, lvl, ymd, content, lastmodify_dt) VALUES (#{title}, #{nara}, #{year}, #{lvl}, #{ymd}, #{content}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP)
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, nara, year, lvl, ymd, content, lastmodify_dt as lastmodifyDt FROM cms.movie_review WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE cms.movie_review SET title = #{title}, nara = #{nara}, year = #{year}, lvl = #{lvl}, ymd = #{ymd}, content = #{content}, lastmodify_dt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, title, nara, year, lvl, ymd, content, lastmodify_dt as lastmodifyDt FROM cms.movie_review
ORDER BY ymd DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{skip}
